atlas v0.5
Back To Families

Contemporary Web Family

Neon Techno-Futurist Interface

Dark-ground, neon-accent, worldbuilding-first pages that feel closer to game, hardware, or future-tech launch surfaces than to standard product pages.

Historical Roots

Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Structure Fit

Immersive StageDossier / Feature

Interpretation

怎么借这条家族，而不是只模仿表面

Signature

  • neon-on-dark contrast
  • future-world mood
  • glow as atmosphere
  • dramatic hardware or scene framing

Borrow

  • dark-stage contrast
  • controlled neon accents
  • future-tech worldbuilding without losing hierarchy

Best For

  • gaming
  • hardware launches
  • immersive tech brands
  • futurist campaign pages

Avoid When

  • quiet reading is the main task
  • credibility depends on calm neutrality
  • the content has to feel archival or scholarly

Sample Gallery

真实网站样本

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

Historical Roots

它从哪些更早的语言长出来

1980s-present

Science fiction / game and tech culture

Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

高饱和霓虹、黑夜城市、技术感界面、世界观驱动。它更像视觉文化分支。

Descendant Families

Neon Techno-Futurist InterfaceStage-Driven Showcase
Open movement

Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格 packet

Prompt DNA

Neon Techno-Futurist Interface

Use a neon techno-futurist family: dark base, controlled neon accents, high-energy worldbuilding, and hierarchy that still stays legible inside a dramatic future-tech atmosphere.

Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节

  • Cyberpunk
  • Razer
  • Britannica: Cyberpunk

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.
